highlights: Commander status uses running/success/partial/failed, but SKILL task schema uses queued/claimed/done/failed; partial not recognized
Monitor marks partial as failure (bin/stampede-monitor.sh:349-354); commander-001 partial would show ❌
Launcher writes status blocked (stampede.sh:171-180) not in commander contract
Run state blocked while commander artifacts show success (state.json vs commander-003.json)
Commander-004 swarm-state telemetry inconsistent: squad_leads_started=0 but completed=9
